actions.name: CreateAct
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new AI task (act) within a session that can interact with tools and perform specific actions

actions.name: CreateSession
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new session context within a workflow run to manage conversation state and acts

actions.name: CreateWorkflowDefinition
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new workflow definition template that can be used to execute multiple workflow runs

actions.name: CreateWorkflowRun
actions.description: Grants permission to create a new execution instance of a workflow definition with specified parameters

actions.name: DeleteWorkflowDefinition
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a workflow definition and all associated resources

actions.name: DeleteWorkflowRun
actions.description: Grants permission to terminate and clean up a workflow run, stopping all associated acts and sessions

actions.name: GetWorkflowDefinition
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve details and configuration of a specific workflow definition

actions.name: GetWorkflowRun
actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve the current state, configuration, and execution details of a workflow run

actions.name: InvokeActStep
actions.description: Grants permission to execute the next step of an act, processing tool call results and returning new tool calls if needed

actions.name: ListActs
actions.description: Grants permission to list all acts within a specific session with their current status and execution details

actions.name: ListModels
actions.description: Grants permission to list all available AI models that can be used for workflow execution, including their status and compatibility information

actions.name: ListSessions
actions.description: Grants permission to list all sessions within a specific workflow run

actions.name: ListWorkflowDefinitions
actions.description: Grants permission to list all workflow definitions in your account with optional filtering and pagination

actions.name: ListWorkflowRuns
actions.description: Grants permission to list all workflow runs for a specific workflow definition with optional filtering and pagination

actions.name: UpdateAct
actions.description: Grants permission to update an existing act's configuration, status, or error information

actions.name: UpdateWorkflowRun
actions.description: Grants permission to update the configuration or state of an active workflow run
